segments.text: Nice! The aerial attack—that nair from the Haniwa!
segments.original_text: やりました。さあ空中攻撃、このハニワを操作しながらの空中ニュートラル

segments.text: That's supposed to be harder than it looks!
segments.original_text: 見た目より難しいはずなんですけどね
おっとこれ、被ダメージ

full_text: Nice! The aerial attack—that nair from the Haniwa! That's supposed to be harder than it looks! Oh, took damage!
corrections: ハニマ→ハニワ (Lloid/haniwa, Villager's side B)
空中ユダル→空中ニュートラル (aerial neutral)
非ダメージ→被ダメージ (damage received, kanji homophone)
